name: Anglesey (United Kingdom)
description: A red field with three white chevrons across.
history: Based on the historic arms attributed to Hwfa ap Cynddelw, lord of Anglesey; recognised by the Flag Institute as the flag of Anglesey.

features.symbolism: from the medieval arms attributed to Hwfa ap Cynddelw, the chief of one of the Fifteen Tribes of Gwynedd
